## 1. Executive Summary
- **Statistics:** 0 tasks completed, 1 task pending.
- **Key Achievements:** N/A.
- **Risks:** High risk of service interruption due to upcoming certificate expiration on 04/05; task remains stalled due to lack of response from the external partner.

## 2. Pending & Risks
| Date | Pending Task | Requester | Assignee | Status |
|:---:|:---|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| 03-25 | Certificate renewal (Expires 4/5) | Minjun Lee (Internal) | David Kim (External) | Delayed |

## 3. Management Gap
- [Target] David Kim (External) - Unresponsive after 2 follow-up attempts. Recommend immediate management escalation or identifying an alternative contact to ensure renewal before the 04/05 expiration date.

## 4. Strategic Insights
Establish a clear escalation protocol for critical security renewals and require external partners to provide a secondary point of contact for time-sensitive infrastructure tasks.
